Story.Title: The Goblin's Ambush
Story.Description: A mysterious path through the Vedant Forest leads to an unexpected encounter.
Story.NarrativeText: You've heard rumors of strange happenings in the Vedant Forest. Local villagers speak of missing travelers and eerie sounds at night. Armed with courage and curiosity, you decide to investigate the old forest path that leads to an abandoned campsite deep in the woods.

RewardTiers.Death: No rewards - the forest claims another victim
RewardTiers.Failure: Minimal rewards - you survive but gain little
RewardTiers.Minimal: Basic rewards - some items and experience
RewardTiers.Normal: Good rewards - useful items and solid experience
RewardTiers.Exceptional: Excellent rewards - rare items and maximum experience

Death.Narrative: Lost in the deepening gloom, you stumble into a ravine. Your cries echo unheard as darkness claims you.

Failure.Narrative: The forest proves too dense and disorienting. You retreat to your camp, your investigation incomplete.

Minimal.Narrative: You push through the undergrowth with difficulty, finding only vague traces of recent activity.

Normal.Narrative: Your sharp eyes catch important details - broken branches and faint footprints guide you deeper into the forest.

Exceptional.Narrative: Your exceptional perception reveals a hidden trail! Fresh goblin tracks and discarded equipment tell a clear story.

Segments.SegmentTitle: You are making your way through the dense forest undergrowth

Segments.DecisionText: The forest path splits into two directions. To the left, you can hear the sound of running water - likely the babbling brook. To the right, the path seems to lead toward denser vegetation. Which way do you go?

Left.Description: Head toward the babbling brook through the underbrush

Right.Description: Take the path toward the dense vegetation

Segments.SegmentTitle: You stand at the fork in the path, considering your options

Death.Narrative: A misstep sends you tumbling into the rushing brook. The current sweeps you away before you can cry out.

Failure.Narrative: Your clumsy movements alert every creature within earshot. You hear goblin war cries approaching rapidly.

Minimal.Narrative: You move quietly enough to avoid immediate danger, though twigs snap underfoot at crucial moments.

Normal.Narrative: Your stealthy approach pays off. You spot the goblin encampment ahead without being detected.

Exceptional.Narrative: Like a shadow, you glide through the forest. You're close enough to overhear the goblins' plans!

Segments.SegmentTitle: You carefully follow the sound of water through the underbrush

Death.Narrative: The thorns prove too much. Poisonous barbs pierce your skin, and fever takes you within moments.

Failure.Narrative: Bloodied by thorns and exhausted, you're forced to turn back and find another route.

Minimal.Narrative: You force your way through, clothes torn and skin scratched, but you emerge on the other side.

Normal.Narrative: With determined effort, you push through the thicket, finding a game trail that eases your passage.

Exceptional.Narrative: Your strength makes short work of the obstacles. You even find an old adventurer's pack tangled in the vines!

Segments.SegmentTitle: You struggle against the dense vegetation, thorns catching at your clothing

Death.Narrative: The goblin's blade finds its mark. As your vision fades, you hear its victorious cackling.

Failure.Narrative: Overwhelmed by the goblin's ferocity, you flee deeper into the forest, wounded and disoriented.

Minimal.Narrative: You manage to drive off the goblin scout, though not without taking several painful wounds.

Normal.Narrative: After a fierce battle, you defeat the goblin scout. It flees, dropping a small pouch in its haste.

Exceptional.Narrative: You dispatch the goblin with masterful combat prowess! It surrenders, revealing the location of its camp.

Segments.SegmentTitle: You are locked in combat with the goblin scout

Segments.DecisionText: After the encounter with the goblin, you notice tracks leading deeper into the forest. You could follow them to investigate further, or you could take a safer path around through the fern gully. What do you do?

Follow.Text: Follow the tracks deeper into the forest
Follow.Description: A direct but dangerous approach to find the goblin camp

Around.Text: Take the safer path through the fern gully
Around.Description: A longer route that avoids the goblin patrols

Segments.SegmentTitle: You study the tracks in the dirt, weighing your options

Death.Narrative: The goblin warrior's axe cleaves through your defenses. The last thing you see is its cruel grin.

Failure.Narrative: Battered and bleeding, you barely escape the warrior's fury. The forest offers refuge as you limp away.

Minimal.Narrative: You survive the encounter, though the warrior's skill leaves you badly wounded. It retreats, honor satisfied.

Normal.Narrative: Through skill and determination, you best the goblin warrior. It yields, tossing down its weapon in defeat.

Exceptional.Narrative: Your legendary combat display defeats the warrior utterly! You claim its enchanted armor as your prize.

Segments.SegmentActivity: Fighting the goblin warrior in the dark
Segments.SegmentTitle: You battle the armored goblin warrior in the dim light and treacherous footing

Death.Narrative: Exhausted and lost, you collapse in the fern gully. The forest creatures find you before help arrives.

Failure.Narrative: The detour proves too challenging. Tired and hungry, you abandon your quest and return to civilization.

Minimal.Narrative: You navigate the gully successfully, though the journey leaves you weary and your supplies depleted.

Normal.Narrative: Your wilderness skills serve you well. You find edible berries and a safe path through the gully.

Exceptional.Narrative: Your masterful woodcraft reveals hidden treasures! You discover a cache of supplies left by previous adventurers.

Segments.SegmentTitle: You navigate carefully through the fern gully, avoiding the goblin patrols

Story.Title: Gremlin Mischief
Story.Description: A simple encounter with a mischievous gremlin causing trouble near the forest entrance.
Story.NarrativeText: Reports of small items going missing and strange noises at night have the villagers worried. A small, impish creature has been spotted near the forest entrance. Someone needs to deal with this pest before it causes real problems.

RewardTiers.Failure: You retreat, unable to handle even a gremlin
RewardTiers.Minimal: You survive the encounter with minor injuries
RewardTiers.Normal: You successfully deal with the gremlin threat

Death.Narrative: While searching for the gremlin, you fall into a hidden pit trap it had set. The fall is fatal.

Failure.Narrative: You cannot find any trace of the elusive creature. Frustrated and embarrassed, you give up the search.

Minimal.Narrative: After much searching, you catch a glimpse of the creature darting behind some bushes. The chase is on!

Normal.Narrative: Your keen eyes spot tiny footprints and disturbed leaves. You follow the trail carefully toward the gremlin's location.

Exceptional.Narrative: Your exceptional tracking skills lead you directly to the gremlin's hiding spot. It seems surprised to be found so quickly!

Segments.SegmentTitle: You are searching for signs of the troublesome gremlin

Death.Narrative: The gremlin throws a rock that hits you square in the temple. You fall backward, striking your head on a stone. Everything goes dark.

Failure.Narrative: The nimble gremlin escapes through a tiny gap in the undergrowth. You've lost it completely.

Minimal.Narrative: You dodge most of the debris the gremlin throws at you, though a few rocks leave bruises. You've got it cornered now!

Normal.Narrative: You skillfully avoid the gremlin's thrown objects and manage to back it into a corner. It chatters angrily at you.

Exceptional.Narrative: With acrobatic grace, you dodge everything the gremlin throws while herding it exactly where you want it. It realizes it's trapped!

Segments.SegmentTitle: You attempt to corner the elusive gremlin

Death.Narrative: The gremlin's wild flailing catches you off guard. You trip and fall, hitting your head. The last thing you hear is its cackling laughter.

Failure.Narrative: The gremlin proves too tough to handle. It escapes while you nurse your bruises, chattering mockingly as it disappears into the forest.

Minimal.Narrative: After a clumsy scuffle, you manage to drive the gremlin away. It flees into the forest, hopefully never to return. You're left with several painful bruises.

Normal.Narrative: You successfully subdue the gremlin with minimal injury. It scampers away defeated, dropping a small shiny trinket in its haste to escape.

Exceptional.Narrative: You dispatch the gremlin with impressive efficiency! It surrenders completely, offering you its collected 'treasures' before fleeing. The village is safe once more!

Segments.SegmentTitle: You are in combat with the cornered gremlin
